topicDefinition.oneLiner: Transform your text into professional videos instantly. Perfect for bloggers, marketers, and content creators.
boundaries: Must generate net-new video content directly from text prompts (not just editing existing clips).
Must handle text-to-video as a primary workflow, ranging from short cinematic clips to full blog conversions.
Excludes purely audio-driven or image-only generators without motion.

howToChoose.title: Evaluate Prompt Adherence
howToChoose.desc: Check if the tool strictly follows your text instructions (camera angles, lighting, motion) or if it frequently hallucinates details.

howToChoose.title: Check Maximum Video Length
howToChoose.desc: Cinematic tools like Sora or Veo generate 10-25 second clips per prompt, while tools like Pictory can convert an entire 1,500-word blog post into a 3-minute video.

howToChoose.title: Verify Commercial Use Rights
howToChoose.desc: Ensure the plan you select allows for unrestricted commercial use, especially if you plan to monetize on YouTube or use the video in paid advertising.

sources.title: Best AI Video Generators in 2026: A Practical Comparison
sources.excerpt: A deep dive comparing top cinematic text-to-video models based on motion quality and adherence.

sections.heading: Top Performers for Production Work
sections.content: Runway (Gen-series) is praised for its polished user experience, broad creative ecosystem, and control over outputs. Kling 3.0 is known for cinematic motion, high-energy scenes, and eye-catching output.

keyClaims: Polished user experience and broad creative ecosystem
Mature workflow with stable collaboration patterns
limitations: Some users report variability in scene logic locking
proofSnippets: Runway (Gen-series): Praised for polished user experience, broad creative ecosystem, and control over outputs.
Kling 3.0: Known for cinematic motion, high-energy scenes, and eye-catching output. Faster generation for social media.

notes: Focuses on cinematic fidelity and production control.

sources.title: Generating videos on Sora | OpenAI
sources.excerpt: Official details and limits for OpenAI's Sora text-to-video generator.

sections.heading: Pricing and Usage Limits
sections.content: Included with ChatGPT Plus. Generate up to 50 videos at 480p resolution or fewer at 720p each month. Pro plan includes 10x more usage.

sections.heading: Watermarking
sections.content: All Sora-generated videos come with C2PA metadata. Visible watermarks are applied by default.

keyClaims: Supports up to 25 seconds in Pro mode
pricingClaims: Included with ChatGPT Plus at no additional cost
watermarkRules: Visible watermarks are applied by default
limitations: ChatGPT Plus limited to 50 videos at 480p per month
Strict safety restrictions blocking specific content
proofSnippets: Sora is included with ChatGPT Plus at no additional cost, allowing users to generate up to 50 videos at 480p resolution.
Users can generate videos up to 1080p resolution and 20 seconds in length across various aspect ratios.

notes: Official constraints on resolution, duration, and watermarks for the most popular generator.

sources.title: Runway Official Usage Rights and Pricing
sources.excerpt: Official policy on Runway's commercial licensing and API costs.

sections.heading: Commercial Use Rights
sections.content: You can use content created in Runway for commercial purposes without restrictions. You retain full ownership across any plan.

keyClaims: Full ownership and rights to all generated content
No attribution required for commercial use
pricingClaims: API charges are credit-based at $0.01 per credit
exportRules: Standard plan handles 1-2 minutes per generation
Pro plan handles 3-7.5 minutes per generation
limitations: Video API generation costs 5-40 credits per second depending on model
proofSnippets: Yes, you can use content created in Runway for commercial purposes without restrictions.
You retain full ownership and rights to all content you generate across any Runway plan (Free, Standard, Pro, or Unlimited).

notes: Provides official confirmation of unlimited commercial usage rights, a crucial decision factor.
